title: neanotis hutchinsonii
intro: Neanotis hutchinsonii, also known as the Himalayan neanotis or Hutchinson's neanotis, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial activities. Neanotis hutchinsonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
